2015October 18, 2015

🇺🇸 Baltimore, USA

Resolutions of the plenary meeting of ISO/TC 184/SC 4, Baltimore, United States, October 18, 2015 -- October 23, 2015

Meeting URNurn:iso:tc:184:sc:4:meeting:plenary-2015-10-baltimore-usa

18 Resolutions

921Plenary
Approve PWI for new Edition 3 of ISO 14306 JT
SC4 approves a PWI to create a new edition 3 of ISO 14306.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
920Plenary
Appoint experts to Joint Task Force for product properties database
SC4 appoints the following experts to assist in the work of the Joint Task Force to explore the establishment of a database for product properties and classes: * Wolfgang Wilkes: ISO 13584 expert a...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
919Plenary
Establish Working Group 15 for Digital Manufacturing
SC4 decides to establish Working Group 15 "Digital manufacturing". The goal of this working group is to coordinate the SC 4 internal efforts in this area with other standards organizations and to o...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
918Plenary
Solicit subject matter experts for WG 2 Parts Libraries
SC4 requests its secretariat to ask its P- and O-Members to nominate subject matter experts in the area of Part Libraries. The invitation should also be sent to ISO users of the PLIB standards.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
917Plenary
Apply 2-month ballot duration to specific NP proposals
SC4 requests its Secretariat to apply the 2-month duration to the proposed NPs for: * ISO 10303 AP239 ed 3 PLCS * ISO 18828-4 KPI in production planning processes * ISO 8000-115 Master data: Qualit...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
916Plenary
Terminate SC 4 Liaison with ASAM
SC4 requests its Secretariat to terminate its liaisons with the Association for Standardization of Automation and Measuring Systems (ASAM).
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
915Plenary
Extend standard development track for ISO 18828-2
SC4 requests its Secretariat to change the development track of ISO 18828-2 from 24 months to 36 months.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
914Plenary
Extend standard development track for ISO 10303-57
SC4 requests its Secretariat to change the development track of ISO 10303-57 from 36 months to 48 months.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
913Plenary
Nominate Howard Mason for an additional term as SC 4 Chair
SC4 nominates Howard Mason for an additional two year term (January 2016 - December 2017) as the Chair of ISO/TC 184 / SC 4 and instructs the Secretary to forward his nomination to ISO/TC 184 withi...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
912Plenary
Reappoint Nils Sandsmark as WG 22 Convener
SC4 appoints Nils Sandsmark as Convener for WG 22 "Reference Data Validation Team" for a further three-year term, with appreciation for his offer to serve in that capacity.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
911Plenary
Reappoint Jochen Haenisch as WG 21 Deputy Convener
SC4 appoints Jochen Haenisch as Deputy Convener for WG 21 "SMRL Validation Team" for a further three-year term, with appreciation for his offer to serve in that capacity.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
910Plenary
Reappoint Keith Hunten as WG 21 Convener
SC4 appoints Keith Hunten as Convener for WG 21 "SMRL Validation Team" for a further three-year term, with appreciation for his offer to serve in that capacity.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
909Plenary
Reappoint Paul van Exel as WG 03 Convener
SC4 appoints Paul van Exel as Convener for WG 03 "Oil, Gas, Process and Power" for a further three year term, with appreciation for his offer to serve in that capacity.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
908Plenary
Reappoint Howard Mason as Change Management Committee Convener
SC4 appoints Mr. Howard Mason as Convener for the Change Management Committee for a further three-year term, with an appreciation for his offer to serve in that capacity.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
907Plenary
Approve new project leaders and editors for SC 4 projects
SC4 approves the following new project leaders and/or project editors for the associated SC 4 projects: |=== |ISO Project # |Project Lead |Document Editor |15926-10 |Manoj Dharwadkar |Hiroshi Okada...

Acclamation

Acclamation
Acclamation
SC4 expresses its appreciation to Peter Benson, and Vicky Kondravy for hosting the 70th ISO/TC 184/SC 4 Plenary in Baltimore, Maryland, 2015-10-18/23. Special acknowledgement is extended to the Pie...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
ISO/TC 184/SC 4

Industrial data

Standardization of the content, meaning, structure, representation and quality management of information for engineered products throughout their lifecycle.

Committee

  • Secretariat: ANSI (Secretariat)
  • Chair: Kenneth Swope
  • Established: 1984
  • Standards: 822 published
  • Members: 21 (P), 14 (O)
